parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;

return [{
  json: {
    title: d.title || '',
    description: (d.description || '') + 
      (d.facilities ? '\n\nFacilities: ' + d.facilities : '') + 
      (d.support ? '\n\nSupport: ' + d.support : ''),
    asking_price: parseFloat((d.askingPrice || '0').replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || null,
    revenue: d.grossIncome || null,
    ebitda: d.cashFlow || null,
    location: d.location?.trim() || '',
    industry: d.industry || '',
    broker_name: d.brokerName || '',
    broker_phone: d.brokerPhone || '',
    employees: d.employees || null,
    year_established: d.yearEstablished || null,
    financing: d.financingAvailable || '',
    ffe: d.ffe || null,
    listing_url: d.listingUrl || '',
    business_id: d.businessId || '',
    source: 'BizQuest'
  }
}];

const d = $input.first().json;

return [{
  json: {
    title: d.title || '',
    description: (d.description || '') + 
      (d.facilities ? '\n\nFacilities: ' + d.facilities : '') + 
      (d.support ? '\n\nSupport: ' + d.support : ''),
    asking_price: parseFloat((d.askingPrice || '0').replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || null,
    revenue: d.grossIncome || null,
    ebitda: d.cashFlow || null,
    location: d.location?.trim() || '',
    industry: d.industry || '',
    broker_name: d.brokerName || '',
    broker_phone: d.brokerPhone || '',
    employees: d.employees || null,
    year_established: d.yearEstablished || null,
    financing: d.financingAvailable || '',
    ffe: d.ffe || null,
    listing_url: d.listingUrl || '',
    business_id: d.businessId || '',
    source: 'BizQuest'
  }
}];

messageValues.message:
=You are a deal analyst for Madison Lane Capital, a firm that acquires small-to-medium businesses in the USA.

Analyze this business listing and extract structured data, then score it.

SCORING RULES (strict, based on available data only):
- Revenue $500K+           → +2 points
- EBITDA margin 15%+       → +2 points
- Asking price < 5x EBITDA → +2 points
- Location USA             → +1 point
- Low/no red flags         → +2 points
- Growth potential visible → +1 point

If data is missing, score only what exists.

Return ONLY raw JSON, no markdown, no backticks:
{
  "company_name": "business name",
  "industry": "industry",
  "geography": "location",
  "asking_price": <number or null>,
  "revenue": <number or null>,
  "ebitda": <number or null>,
  "ebitda_margin": <percentage or null>,
  "broker_name": "name",
  "broker_phone": "phone",
  "description": "2-3 sentence summary",
  "red_flags": ["array of concerns or empty"],
  "fit_score": <0-10>,
  "fit_reasoning": "explanation",
  "financing_available": "yes/no/details",
  "source": "BizQuest",
  "listing_url": "url"
}

=You are a deal analyst for Madison Lane Capital, a firm that acquires small-to-medium businesses in the USA.

}

json.title: Thriving Profitable Turnkey Independent Sandwich Shop
json.financingAvailable: Owner is willing to finance 20% of purchase price to well qualified buyers
json.description:
Thriving Profitable Turnkey Independent Sandwich Shop

Established in 2011, this profitable sandwich shop represents an exceptional opportunity in Charlottesville's growing Albemarle County market. Located in a busy shopping center, the business has demonstrated strong performance with a 14.3% year-to-date sales increase for 2025 and annual revenue of $620,000.

Business Overview:
This turnkey operation specializes in fresh sandwiches, wraps, smoothies, and salads, all crafted from the finest ingredients. The restaurant features a modern, efficient design in 1,830 square feet of leased space, creating a welcoming atmosphere that enhances the dining experience.

Menu & Services:
- Fresh-cut sandwiches and wraps prepared daily with premium meats and crisp vegetables
- Smoothies blended with real fruits
- Vibrant salads made from fresh ingredients
- Established catering services with regular contracts including UVA Healthcare and the university

Financial Highlights:
- Annual Revenue: $620,000
- Strong profitability with consistent growth trajectory
- 12 employees supporting efficient operations
- Inventory valued at $10,000
- FF&E valued at $100,000
- Manager is paid $50,000 which could go to the new owner operator.
- Owner will take out over $65,000 plus car expenses in 2025.


Location Advantages:
Positioned in Albemarle County's growth corridor, benefiting from steady population expansion driven by education, healthcare, and professional services. Multiple new subdivisions and apartment complexes continue expanding the customer base.

Growth Opportunities:
Significant potential exists to expand the already strong catering segment with focused marketing efforts. The location's position in the county's primary growth area provides excellent prospects for continued expansion.

Lease Terms:
- Monthly rent: $6,225
- Lease expires: March 31, 2027 with an additional 5 year term.
- 1,830 square feet in busy shopping center

Financing:
Seller financing available for 20% of purchase price. The owner, after 40 years in hospitality including 14 years at this location, is retiring and will provide transitional support as needed.

Asking Price: $225,000

This established business offers an ideal opportunity for an owner-operator to acquire a profitable, turnkey operation in a growing market with excellent expansion potential.
json.facilities: The business includes a fully equipped kitchen with modern appliances, a well-designed dining area, and essential equipment such as ovens and refrigeration units. The facilities are optimized for efficient operations and customer service. Additionally, the restaurant comes with point-of-sale systems, furniture, and décor that align with the restaurants branding. All assets are in excellent condition, ensuring a smooth transition and immediate operation for the new owner.
json.support: The seller will provide transitional support as needed by a buyer.

json.title: Catering and Restaurant Business
json.description:
Don’t miss this rare chance to own a fully established restaurant and catering business with a loyal customer base and strong reputation. This is a BUSINESS-ONLY sale – step right in and start earning from day one!
The business features a fully equipped commercial kitchen, spacious prep areas, and all the tools needed to run both dine-in and off-site catering operations. Current owners have built a solid following, providing a strong foundation for continued growth.

Highlights include:
Proven track record with steady revenue and established clientele.
Fully equipped kitchen with modern appliances, fixtures, and catering equipment included in the sale.
Flexible layout suitable for dine-in service, private functions, and off-premise catering.
Experienced staff in place (optional to retain) for a smooth transition
Prime location with high visibility and accessibility
Strong growth potential for expanding catering services, online orders, and private event. This is an excellent opportunity for an experienced operator, chef, or entrepreneur looking to step into a turn-key, profitable business with immediate income potential.
Sale includes business name, fixtures, and equipment.

Showings by appointment only. Financials available with signed confidentiality agreement.

json.title: High-Volume Turnkey Restaurant in Lake Forest & Irvine
json.description:
Intersection of Rockfield Blvd & Lake Forest Dr 

This is a rare opportunity to acquire a high-performing, turnkey restaurant perfectly positioned on the border of Lake Forest and Irvine. Located at the powerhouse intersection of Rockfield Boulevard and Lake Forest Drive, this site serves as the literal gateway between these two high-income cities, capturing the massive daytime business of Irvine and the dense residential growth of Lake Forest.

Executive Summary

Asking Price: $425,000

Monthly Gross Revenue: Approx. $140,000

Recent Performance: Over $421,000 in total revenue (Oct–Dec 2025)

Size: Approx. 2,000 Sq. Ft.

Rent: Under $12,000/Month (Includes NNN)

Lease Term: Secured through July 31, 2030 (5 years remaining)

Strategic "Borderline" Location Advantage

1. The Irvine Business & Auto District Gateway
Directly adjacent to the Irvine Auto Center and the massive Spectrum Business District. This location acts as the primary lunch and dinner destination for thousands of employees from Tesla, Toyota, Ford, and surrounding corporate offices who cross the border daily for the Lake Forest Gateway’s premium dining options.

2. The "Hotel Row" Synergy (4 Major Brands)
Situated directly across from a massive hospitality cluster: SpringHill Suites & TownePlace Suites by Marriott, Hampton Inn, and Homewood Suites. With over 400+ guest rooms, you have a rotating, high-disposable-income customer base of business travelers and tourists literally at your doorstep.

3. 7 Minutes to Irvine Spectrum Center
Enjoy the "Spectrum Halo" without the Spectrum price tag. You are minutes away from the region’s most significant economic hub and the I-5/405 freeway interchange, capturing the overflow of one of the busiest retail corridors in Southern California.

Business & Asset Highlights

Proven High Volume: Consistent performance with daily averages of 90–130 orders and peak days exceeding $5,300 in gross sales.

Powerhouse Co-Tenants: Share the center with national anchors Starbucks, Panera Bread, Buffalo Wild Wings, and IHOP, ensuring constant foot traffic 18 hours a day.

Luxury Residential Growth: Bordered by new multi-million dollar master-planned communities like The Meadows by Toll Brothers, guaranteeing strong evening and weekend demand from affluent local families.

Turnkey & Secure: Fully equipped for high-volume service with a recently extended lease featuring fixed 3% annual increases for long-term stability.

json.title: Successful Restaurant in Prime Covington Location
json.financingAvailable: Seller financing available to qualified buyers only
json.description:
SUCCESSFUL RESTAURANT IN PRIME COVINGTON LOCATION

This highly successful franchised restaurant represents an exceptional turn-key acquisition opportunity in Covington, Kentucky. This local staple has built a loyal customer base over more than 30 years, specializing in high-quality food with outstanding customer service.

FINANCIAL PERFORMANCE:
• Annual Revenue: $1,950,000
• EBITDA: $311,767
• Asking Price: $1,249,000
• FF&E Value: $350,000
• Inventory Value: $15,000

LOCATION & LEASE:
• Prime 2,300 sq ft location on central corridor near Covington riverfront
• Favorable long-term lease at $10,000/month
• Excellent real estate positioning in fast-growing market with significant nearby development

GROWTH OPPORTUNITIES:
• Expand operating hours to capture consistent area traffic
• Implement local store marketing initiatives with schools, churches, libraries, and businesses
• Additional franchise opportunities available within the system
• Untapped potential for increased local market presence

BUSINESS ADVANTAGES:
• Turn-key operation ready for immediate ownership transition
• Established brand recognition and customer loyalty
• Proven profitable concept with 30+ year track record
• Stable competitive environment
• Strategic location benefits from ongoing area development

FINANCING & SUPPORT:
• Seller financing available to qualified buyers
• Comprehensive training package: one week hands-on franchisor training plus one month seller support
• Seamless ownership transition process

This opportunity is ideal for owner-operators or investment groups seeking a profitable, established restaurant with strong growth potential in an excellent location. The seller is focusing on other business ventures, creating this rare opportunity to acquire a proven performer in Kentucky's dynamic riverfront market.
json.facilities: Fully stocked kitchen with refrigerators, freezers, walk-in cooler, walk-in freezer, POS equipment and more.
json.support: Franchisor will provide a week of hands-on training, and Seller will provide a month of support to ensure a seamless handoff.

json.title: Established Fast-Casual Mediterranean Restaurant
json.description:
This is an opportunity to acquire an established fast-casual Mediterranean restaurant franchise opened in 2023 and operating in a high-growth area of Williamson County, Texas. The business is staffed with approximately 13 employees and operates from a modern, purpose-built location with long-term lease security.

Backed by a rapidly growing national brand, authentic menu offerings, and a proven operating system, this restaurant is well positioned for continued success. With comprehensive training and ongoing franchisor support, this opportunity is ideal for an owner-operator or investor seeking a scalable restaurant concept in a thriving market.
json.facilities: Opened in 2023 in a brand-new building, this restaurant features a modern kitchen and dining space with well-maintained, like-new equipment. Favorable lease terms include a 60-month base term with three renewal options and ample parking with easy access.
json.support: The franchisor provides 4 weeks of comprehensive training, covering operations, food preparation, systems, and management. This is paired with ongoing franchisor support, marketing resources, and a proven operating model.
